judge_result.short_rationale: Answer matches the canonical eye-exposure steps and order: rinse eye open with clean water for 15–20 minutes, remove contacts after 5 minutes, and call a physician/poison control immediately. It also preserves the do-not-stop-rinsing warning and escalation timing without adding unsupported advice.
